mapper.update: UPDATE ops_eval_run SET status = #{status}, top1_root_cause_hit = #{top1RootCauseHit}, top3_root_cause_hit = #{top3RootCauseHit}, required_evidence_coverage = #{requiredEvidenceCoverage}, unsupported_conclusion_count = #{unsupportedConclusionCount}, tool_call_count = #{toolCallCount}, diagnosis_latency_ms = #{diagnosisLatencyMs}, final_status = #{finalStatus}, summary_json = #{summaryJson}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE run_id = #{runId}
